summary: UI/UX overhaul testing completed successfully. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working: SAMSON branding with gold 'O', Sanctuary Green color palette (#2D5A47), Join Service banner with Zoom and Calendly links, 6 donation methods (Card/ACH, PayPal, Venmo, Zelle, Crypto, Bank Transfer), Music player with play/pause/mute/volume, sidebar navigation with gold accent on active items, and global search (Cmd+K) command palette.

issues: Hydration warnings for table spans - not affecting functionality, cosmetic React rendering issue
Console warnings about chart dimensions when first loading - charts render correctly after data loads

details: Dashboard loads with all 6 stat cards (Total Members: 201, Active Groups: 20, MTD Giving: $84,250, YTD: $236,303, Recurring Givers: 30)
Join Service banner displays prominently with Video icon
'Join Service' Zoom button links to https://zoom.us/j/placeholder
'Schedule a Visit' Calendly button links to https://calendly.com/placeholder
'Ways to Give' section displays 6 donation method placeholders
Fund Progress bars for all 5 funds
Music player appears at bottom left
SAMSON logo with gold 'O' in sidebar
Gold accent (#D4AF37) on active nav items
All navigation links work (Dashboard, Members, Households, Groups, Events, Attendance, Giving, Communications, Reports, Settings)
Search input with 'Search people, groups, events...' placeholder
Quick Actions: Add Person, Record Donation, View Dashboard
Lists 201 members with pagination (25 per page)
Search by name, email, phone functional
Filter tabs: All (201), Member (13), Visitor (7), Regular (1), Inactive (4)
Member table with Name, Status, Email, Phone, Campus, YTD Giving columns
Shows group types: Small Group, Ministry Team, Volunteer Team, Class
Group cards show leader, member count, capacity, meeting schedule

seed_data_creation: Using existing seeded data (201 members, 20 groups, 80 households)
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX overhaul completed. All new features (Join Service banner, donation methods, music player, green color palette, SAMSON branding) are working. Payment integrations (Stripe, PayPal, Venmo, Zelle) are MOCKED/PLACEHOLDER only. Minor console warnings for React hydration and chart dimensions are cosmetic and don't affect functionality.
mocked_apis_note: Payment integrations (Stripe, PayPal, Venmo, Zelle, Crypto) and email (Resend) are PLACEHOLDER/MOCKED - links point to placeholder URLs (zoom.us/j/placeholder, calendly.com/placeholder, paypal.me/placeholder, venmo.com/placeholder)
